nav.open_recent_failed: Failed to open the recent CDB entry
nav.drag_open_cdb_hint: Drag a .cdb file into DataEditorY and release to load the database
nav.drag_invalid_file: Only .cdb files can be dropped here

search.title: Search Cards
search.name: Name
search.rule_error_expected_left_value: expected a field name or number here
search.rule_error_expected_right_value: expected a field, keyword, or number here
search.rule_error_contains_requires_mask: contains/has can only be used with mask fields
search.rule_error_field_rejects_keyword: field {field} does not accept keyword values
search.rule_error_unexpected_trailing_tokens: unexpected trailing content at the end of the expression

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure the default cover image and the script template here.
settings.description_base: Configure the default cover image and the script template here.
settings.description_extra: Configure AI access, the default cover image, and the script template here.
settings.cover_description: This cover.jpg is used as the fallback image when the card has no art in pics.
settings.cover_save_failed: Failed to save the cover image
settings.ai_description: OpenAI-compatible endpoints are supported. The Base URL can be a full prefix such as https://api.openai.com/v1.
settings.temperature_hint: Default is 1. Adjust it between 0 and 2; higher values usually produce more varied output.
settings.model_placeholder: Connect first to load model options
settings.connect_hint: Enter the Base URL and Secret Key, then click Connect to fetch the model list.
settings.connect_ready: {count} model(s) loaded. You can select one now and keep using it on the next launch.
settings.secret_placeholder_saved: Already saved. Leave empty to keep it unchanged
settings.secret_missing: Secret Key is not configured yet
settings.script_template_description: When you click Script and the file does not exist, this template is used to create it. The {卡名} placeholder is supported.
settings.error_log_description: When the app hits an error, detailed information is written to a local log file for troubleshooting.
settings.error_log_open_failed: Failed to open the error log

editor.title: Card Editor
editor.card_image_description: Start from the current cdb data, upload and crop square art, and preview it live.
editor.card_image_save_jpg_missing_cdb: No cdb file is open, so the image cannot be saved to pics
editor.card_image_save_jpg_overwrite_confirm: {code}.jpg already exists in pics. Replace it?
editor.card_image_preview_hint: The preview refreshes automatically when the form or crop settings change.
editor.card_image_live_preview: Preview updates live from the form and crop result.
editor.card_image_foreground_description: Upload a foreground layer, then drag it in the preview and use handles to rotate or scale it.
editor.card_image_foreground_ready: Foreground image loaded. You can keep dragging, rotating, or scaling it.
editor.card_image_foreground_empty: Upload a transparent foreground asset first.
editor.card_image_foreground_preview_hint: Drag the blue box to move the layer. Use the top handle to rotate and the bottom-right handle to scale.
editor.card_image_foreground_upload_failed: Failed to load the foreground image
editor.card_image_upload_hint: The existing card image is ignored here. Upload source art and crop it to a square.
editor.card_image_ready: Card art is ready. You can recrop it any time.
editor.card_image_crop_hint: Drag the square crop frame to move it. Drag the bottom-right handle or use the wheel to resize it.
editor.card_image_name_color_hint: Leave empty to use the card face default color or rarity auto styling.
editor.card_image_name_shadow_color_hint: Leave empty to skip the extra name shadow layer.
editor.card_image_effect_block_hint: The effect block sits above the foreground art and below the effect text. Only the background color and opacity are adjustable now.
editor.card_image_ai_translate_empty: There is no text to translate yet
editor.name: Name
editor.no_card: Select a card to edit its properties.
editor.new_card_hint: You are editing a new card draft. Enter a passcode to save it.
editor.code_required: Enter a valid card passcode first.
editor.ai_requires_secret_key: AI features are available only after you configure a Secret Key in Settings.
editor.ai_parse_description: Enter one or more card manuscripts and the agent will parse and import them into the current database.
editor.ai_parse_placeholder:
For example:
Name: ...
Type: Effect Monster
Attribute: DARK
Race: Dragon
Level: 4
ATK/DEF: 1800/1000
Effect: ...
editor.ai_parse_applied_draft: Parsed data applied to the current draft
editor.ai_parse_multi_saved: {count} card(s) parsed and written to the database
editor.ai_parse_multi_overwrite_confirm: {count} parsed card(s) already exist in the current database. Overwrite them and continue?
editor.script_stage_requesting_model: Requesting the model to generate the script...
editor.script_stage_running_tools: Fetching a bit more reference context...
editor.script_create_confirm: c{code}.lua was not found. Create it from the template now?
editor.script_overwrite_confirm: c{code}.lua already exists. Overwrite it with a newly generated script?
editor.package_zip_no_cdb: There is no active CDB to package
editor.create_filtered_cdb_title: Create a CDB From the Current Filter
editor.create_filtered_cdb_hint: All cards matched by the current filter will be written into a new cdb file.
editor.create_filtered_cdb_copy_assets: Also copy scripts and card images
editor.create_filtered_cdb_copy_assets_yes: After the new cdb is saved and opened, matching scripts, main card images, and field images will be copied in the background.
editor.create_filtered_cdb_copy_assets_no: Only create the new cdb file without copying scripts or images.
editor.create_filtered_cdb_empty: The current filter returned no cards, so a new cdb cannot be created
editor.create_filtered_cdb_success: Created a new cdb from the current filter with {count} card(s)
editor.create_filtered_cdb_failed: Failed to create the filtered cdb
editor.create_filtered_cdb_copying_assets: Copying scripts and images in the background...
editor.create_filtered_cdb_assets_failed: Failed to copy scripts or images
editor.merge_cdb_hint: Choose two cdb files, analyze conflicts first, then export a new merged result.
editor.merge_cdb_same_source: You cannot merge the same cdb with itself
editor.merge_cdb_success: The merged CDB has been created and opened
editor.output_path_must_be_new: Choose a new output path that is different from the source and not already open
editor.package_zip_unsaved_script_confirm: The current script has unsaved changes. Save it before packaging?
editor.package_zip_unsaved_cdb_confirm: Database {name} has unsaved changes. Save it before packaging?
editor.script_reload_confirm: The current script has unsaved changes. Reloading will discard them. Continue?
editor.script_effect_empty: This card has no effect text.
editor.script_empty_description: Open a card script from the card editor to start editing it here.
editor.replace_original_confirm: The passcode changed from {oldCode} to {newCode}. Choose Yes to delete the original card and save with the new passcode, or No to keep the original card and create/overwrite the new one.
editor.clipboard_empty: There are no cards available to copy or paste
editor.no_card_selected: Select at least one card first
editor.paste_conflict_confirm: {count} card(s) already exist in the target database. Overwrite and continue?
editor.unsaved_close_confirm: {name} has unsaved changes. Close this tab anyway?
